name: Warehouse Migrator
description: The Warehouse Migrator by Smart IS simplifies moving ID-based configuration data between environments with custom control files. It ensures hierarchy integrity and streamlines rollouts in SAS environments. With unmatched robustness and ease of use, it is the go-to solution for multi-environment businesses. Say goodbye to ID mismatches and hello to efficient configuration duplication.
valueProposition: Warehouse or subset duplication with just a few clicks
Fits the new warehouse model offered by Blue Yonder
A duplicate Warehouse can be made anytime without a call & in off hours.
Secures data by providing backing up
features: Load into Target Environment through an Extracted File
Load into Target Environment using Roll-out
Saving Extract Data as a Named data set
Extracting & Loading a Subset of Data, and/ or as Functional Sets
Directly Load data from one environment to another using Remote Call*
